'''Dustangle''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] who hid in the underground caverns of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] subjugated his [[Planet/Legends|world]]. His cousin was [[Dustini Spa Ronii]].<ref name="MMY" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' {{Mo}}

{{Reflist}}

[[File:Corellian_princess_ring.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A ring that once belonged to a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Prince/Legends|princess]]. Given to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] by Dustangle when on a mission at [[Mount Yoda]]]]
